# Upgrade Plan

## Overview

Upgrade the Java project to the latest LTS versions: **Java 21** and **Spring Boot 3.4**.

This includes upgrading the JDK, Spring Boot framework, Spring Framework (6.x), and all related Spring ecosystem dependencies. Any `javax.*` to `jakarta.*` namespace migrations will be handled as part of this upgrade.

## Tasks

See `tasks.json` for the detailed task breakdown.

| ID | Description | Status |
|----|-------------|--------|
| 001-upgrade-java-spring-boot | Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4 | pending |
